title: Fix: Memory leak in connection pool
original_text: Fixed memory leak in database connection pool. Connections were not being properly released after use. Added connection timeout and proper cleanup. Implemented connection pool monitoring. Added memory profiling to detect leaks. Result: memory usage stable.
expected_subject: fix(db): fix memory leak in connection pool
expected_body_lines: - Fix connection not being properly released
- Add connection timeout and proper cleanup
- Add memory profiling to detect leaks
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(db): fix memory leak in connection pool"
